note: Peripheral-OTA orchestrator. Retains RTTI (C++ class names survive as typeinfo strings); functions are FUN_* and named via the common_logf anchor (0x16c9a0) + a fan-out over the ~99 logging functions. See main/update/README.md and main/docs/update.md.

supplier_dispatch.mechanism: std::string::find on the OTA device/file-name token; supplier is NOT runtime-sensed.

matches.<token code>: SmpModemUpdateClient (nRF modem) or LightweightUpdateClient (CAN flash, e.g. motor) per parsed device code
matches.battery_primary w/o supplier: throws invalid_argument 'first token of file name should be battery_primary_panasonic or battery_primary_dynapack'

main.0x10c0e0: update_service_main (argv -f/--force -e/--exit; opens CAN /dev/ttymxc3; builds UpdateService graph; /tmp/download/VM_XS5_FOTA)

manifest.0x119210: manifest_parse (open manifest.txt, skip header, parse rows)
manifest.0x118920: manifest_parse_row (CSV split; >=14 fields; device-name '-'->'_'; semver; allowed_to_skip/skip_rollback)

runfota.0x1d220: runfota_read_boot_control_flag ('Boot control version: %s, partition: %d, stage: %d'; version match)

update_service.0x125040: update_service_handle_device_update (compare current vs wanted; get client; update x3)
update_service.0x127920: update_service_on_manifest_message (OD/MQTT manifest cb; basename+ext check; notify runfota)
update_service.0x129c90: update_service_run_device_updates (per-device manifest loop; stage2; skip/rollback; background-update enqueue)
update_service.0x12a6d0: update_service_run_state_machine (2-stage + rollback; boot-control vtable 0x70 commit/0x78 rollback/0x88 reboot; battery gate)

background_update.0x1120e0: background_update_trigger_update (enqueue device to bg queue + notify worker)
background_update.0x114ed0: background_update_worker_loop (gate on SoC>=11% & +0x12c>=31; run client; remove on terminal)

smp_modem_update_client.0x1f370: smp_modem_system_execute_with_timeout (600s watchdog; ps|grep + kill on timeout)
smp_modem_update_client.0x120320: smp_modem_update_client_run_update (clear nordic/version_info; disconnect LTE; init; SMP transfer; restart bridge)

c2000_update_client.0x130580: c2000_flash_application_image (DFU; running checksum; footer magic 0x1be4/0xe41b; status 0x1000)
c2000_update_client.0x130bd0: c2000_flash_motor_controller (TMS320F40049C; GPIO reset gpio12/125/126; auto-baud; flash kernel+app)

thirdparty_update_client._note: Shared page-CRC-over-CAN flash base for Panasonic/Dynapack/Liteon. FSM state @obj+0xf4: 2 SIZE_INFO -> 3 PAGE_CRC -> 4 IMAGE_CRC -> 5 UPDATE_REQ -> 7 TERMINAL. OD ops on target node a0 (0xA7 charger / 0xA4 battery), group a1=0x8A, op = OD-key high byte. See main/docs/update.md 'Page-CRC-over-CAN flash protocol'. NOTE: exact on-wire a1/low CAN-id bits per op are runtime-resolved from the libvm OD descriptor table (not literal in the binary).
thirdparty_update_client.0x138d80: thirdparty_validate_charger_type (Liteon: 'charger type is matched with max current')
thirdparty_update_client.0x1383e0: thirdparty_on_flash_size_info (byteswap page size/count BE16; 'Flash file too large'; state 3)
thirdparty_update_client.0x137580: thirdparty_write_page (pad 0xFF; CRC32 -> expected; stream 8B/frame via write 0x83)
thirdparty_update_client.0x137fb0: thirdparty_post_vm_call (async libvm call by name; timeout = arg*1000 ms)
thirdparty_update_client.0x13d940: od_send_flash_0x81 (size-info request; DLC4; reply page_size||page_count BE16)
thirdparty_update_client.0x16bfa0: od_route_rebind (bind reply routes from source {0xA3,0x8A} onto the client; new_sig>=0x65)
thirdparty_update_client.0x16ee70: crc32_ieee (CRC-32 poly 0xEDB88320, init 0xFFFFFFFF, final XOR; page + whole-image)

common_framework_vendor._note: devices/main/common + lib (shared across all main-module services; vendor - named for navigation only, not reconstructed).
common_framework_vendor.0x153e80: service_env_ctor (vm_init; MQTT localhost:5000; CAN open; signal handlers)
common_framework_vendor.0x16b770: tp_handle_received_frame (lib/tp.c CAN transport RX; multiframe reassembly)
